transcript.text:
(Nagoya, Japan)
(The center of Japanese culture and arts)
(After spending the whole day exploring Nagoya...)
(In the early evening, heading by car to today’s food spot...!)
(Shinsakae-machi)
Hello, everyone
So today...
I'm here in Nagoya to eat yakiniku,
and see that place over there?
(A 44-year-old local hidden gem in Nagoya, "Jeongnakwon") Apparently it's been around for 44 years this year
People living in Nagoya would probably know it
It's a famous yakiniku spot among locals,
not many tourists know about it
It's one of those real hidden gems
Some call it “a 30-year life experience bulgogi”
A local taxi driver also highly recommended this place!

It's known to be incredibly delicious
Actually, this place rarely allows filming,
but since the driver is a regular, we were able to get special permission to shoot here
Since it was hard to get access, we’re just filming a quick meal and heading out
There are a lot of customers, so I'll eat quickly and leave
(Welcome) It smells delicious from the front
(Open at 5 PM) I got here right when it opened,
and there were already a lot of customers outside
(Since I'm here, I guess I'll take a look at the menu...)
(Oh, I don't know Japanese) I can't read it at all
(But we have Teacher Pa with us...) I can't understand it at all,
but nowadays, technology is so advanced that I can just translate it
The beef tongue here is really delicious!
And there are many reviews saying that "Mino,"
the beef stomach, is the most delicious
(50,000 won per serving...) The tenderloin is incredibly delicious, but the price is on the higher side...

It's a tasting piece at the end
For the beef tongue, it's less than 10,000 won
per serving,
and some other menu items are also under 10,000 won, so the prices are reasonable
3 servings of this...
3 servings of this...
(Order: 3 tenderloin, 3 sirloin, 3 beef tongue,)
(3 intercostal, 3 stomach, 3 large intestine, 3 rump steak, 1 rib soup)
(Eating alone...?)
(Order complete)
(The food that comes out as I worry) Did I order well?
(Gyūtan (beef tongue)) That's definitely beef tongue
I’m a bit sensitive to beef tongue, so I’m worried
(Shio mino (stomach)) Usually, they cut it thick
but it's really thin here
(Hire (tenderloin)) The hire is marinated

(And the "rib soup" that came with it) This gukbap is a proper beef soup
It looks exactly like my favorite gukbap place
It’s like a beef soup with a bit of a yukgaejang vibe
(While waiting for the rest, I’ll finish a bowl of gukbap...)
(Arrived right away)
This is the ribeye, and this is the rump steak
(Hip (rump steak))
(Horumon (large intestine)) It’s the large intestine with the fat removed
There’s regular large intestine and one with the fat removed
I found it interesting, so I decided to order it
3 servings, 3 servings, 3 servings...
It's 21 servings in total
(Seems like you can't finish it alone...)
(This is all 21 servings...)
(The first cut) It looks so delicious. I'll start with the beef tongue!
Since the prices are a bit high here,

I'm feeling a bit nervous...
So I’ll make sure to grill each piece carefully
It's really thin, so it cooks quickly!
(Three carefully grilled pieces of beef tongue) It's cooking quickly
Gotta stop now
Bon appétit
This is lemon sauce
They said to dip it in this,
(Can't miss this, haha!) but I'll try the original flavor first
Oh?!
(Amazing) It doesn't have any unpleasant smell
I’m really sensitive to the smell of beef tongue,
so I couldn’t even eat it if it was in a broth,
but there’s absolutely no smell here
The sauce is a bit... tangy? It’s a sour sauce,
and the texture is really good

(The most popular dish, shio mino (beef stomach)) Next, first stomach
It's beef stomach
It's called mino
This is the most popular
I've never seen it so thinly cut
(This time with soy sauce) You're supposed to dip it in this sauce!
It's so chewy...!
Should I cook it a bit more this time?
(Crunch)
This one should be cooked a bit more
to bring out that crunchy texture!
It becomes more tender too
I cooked this one too much
It's so delicious
What?
(Add some charred flavor)

Get that perfect smoky flavor
(Satisfied)
This is the fat-trimmed large intestine, called horumon,
and they say you should start grilling it from the back or skin side
The fire is great
I’m pretty skilled at grilling stuff like this, you know
There's no oil!
It’s like just the skin of the large intestine
This is so good
(Grilling a lot of horumon)
The hire is the most expensive item here
Twice the price of the second priciest one
They said it’s delicious even when barely cooked,
so I’ll try it that way
(We’re here too...)
(Sorry horumon...) Oh no, it's all burnt

No
(Tenderloin just melts in the mouth...)
It's so tender
So this is what it means when they say it melts in your mouth
The cuts I had earlier all had a noticeable chew to them
This is a bit chewy
and the intestine is really chewy
The tenderloin just completely melts in my mouth...
(Next, I’ll have the hip (rump steak))
This is the rump steak
Looks delicious!
I'll try it
It's so oily
It's so delicious
It’s salty, but that saltiness...
kind of balances out the richness,

(Beer) and now I really crave a beer
(If I crave it, I should just have it, right?)
(Drinking beer...)
(That's the stuff)
It's so refreshing
(Back to grilling)
(With rice this time)
It’s like high-quality LA galbi
How is it so rich and fatty like this?
(Next, I'll have the rosu (sirloin))
In Korea, we tend to eat beef as is,
but in Japan, most of the time, the beef for yakiniku is seasoned
They serve a lot like that
Rosu
(Beer transfusion)
(The marbling on the tempting "intercostal") The long-awaited intercostal

The rib cut really does look appetizing
Can you see the marbling?
(Beef tongue comeback) Going back to the beef tongue
(After one round, time to grill the beef tongue again...)
(Since I'm in Nagoya, let me have a glass of Nagoya sake...)
(It’s bound to be amazing...) If I eat a piece of meat with this...
(Amazing)
Beef tongue is delicious
You can order it to your liking, without any seasoning!
So, if you can't handle salty food,
you can just dip it in salt!
It's so good
Yummy
The first stomach is nice and crunchy
I don't think I've seen many places that slice this cut this thin
They said the sauce tastes even better

when you mix in some chili, so I’m adding it
I’ll eat them in order of ranking!
(Sirloin) 4th place!
Ah...! But this...
(Being 4th doesn’t mean it’s bad...) It's hard to call it 4th place
It's so good
It's too good to call it 4th place
(It’s better to grill one at a time here for more flavor!) Here, each piece cooks really quickly
because it's so thin
You eat one piece at a time here
(Got more rice)
Ah, this place has a lot of
Korean dishes, like kimchi!
Look here!
Janggu
Bulgogi actually originated in Korea!

(While grilling, I learned the origin of yakinikyu...) Oh really?
(While grilling, I learned the origin of yakinikyu...) It came from Mongolia, following Korea
(Got burnt while looking at the janggu)
I should cut it with scissors
It's so tender and delicious
Naengmyeon
This is naengmyeon
It looks more like Korean banquet noodles than naengmyeon
It has minced meat inside too
I'll try it
Oh, so refreshing
It's a subtly addictive taste, like Pyongyang naengmyeon, with a mild flavor
The seasoning isn't too strong
(Enjoying the last piece of tenderloin, one slice at a time...) Like Japanese-style bulgogi
This is how bulgogi is eaten, one piece at a time
One piece is too little, so I'll go for two pieces at a time!

Wait, why is there rib here! Hold on a second!
Did I just leave this here?
(Nth time visiting this room) Amazing...!
It seems like this one would taste great even eaten raw...
Last piece...!
(The last one should be a grand finale...) This piece should really soak in that smoky flavor!
When do they close?
(Open until 11 PM) They're open until late
(Huh?) I want to finish off with gukbap
(Hm... Let's think about it...)
How often will you get to visit Nagoya again...?
You can tell others about this and that...
(Convinced)
What gukbap did you order?
It's a secret haha
(Everyone thinks Tzuyang ordered white broth) I think it's 100% white broth

It's 100%
(Suddenly a bet) What are you putting on the line?
This meal will be on me
You'll pay for this?
(Can you handle it?)
That's how sure I am
Gasp!!!
(It's obviously red broth, hehe)
Thanks for dinner
It's so good
(Eating more?) Itadakimasu(?)
That was such a good meal
(Agreed) Gotta admit, grilled meat is just good anywhere
The tenderloin melted in my mouth,
and the beef tongue had no odor, surprisingly good!
Gukbap was amazing too!

(Great taste, but also makes you crave a drink!) It was overall quite tasty
It seems like it pairs really well with alcohol
Once again, I enjoyed today's meal!
Candy
(Receipt found)
Wait
It’s 1,100,000 won...
Where did I put the company card...?
How much did you eat? I didn’t see you eating there
Everyone, submit your statements by tomorrow
You told us to eat all we wanted earlier...!!!
You told me to eat a lot, so I ate a lot...
(It's a joke haha)
(Happy ending thanks to the company card)
I've never seen anyone eat this much in my life
Let me see your face

(It was you, huh? Haha!)
(Where did it all go...?)
(All right here)
I'll come again
(Friendly staff! Thank you for allowing me to film! I ate it all deliciously!)
(What kind of food awaits tomorrow?)
This is my room
(Iroriyaki)
Amazing
Am I really seeing this in person?
I've really wanted to see this in person, it's so awesome!
(Quietly(?) returning, Japan Part 4 Coming soon)
